subcodes.first_line: O pure leaf, render thanks unto God that thou art associated with that pure soul and art the fruit of that verdant tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه طیبه شکر کن خدا را که منتسب بان جان پاکی و ثمره آن شجره پرطراوت از
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @Manifestation of God as educator, @eulogies; reminiscences, @love of God
